title: erigeron scabrellus
intro: Erigeron scabrellus, also known as prairie fleabane or rough fleabane, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Erigeron scabrellus include its ability to reduce fever, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Erigeron scabrellus can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, and are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
